d=document.getElementsByTagName("style");for(c=0;c<d.length;c++){var o;if((n=(o=d[c]).getAttribute("data-href"))===e||n===a)return o}})(n,d))return a();((e,a,c,n,d)=>{var r)t.o(r,n)&&(t.m[n]=r[n]);if(s)s(t)}for(a&&a(c);i<o.length;i++)d=o[i],t.o(e,d)&&e[d]&&e[d][0](),e[d]=0},c=self["b-landing-pages-components__LOADABLE_LOADED_CHUNKS__"]=self["b-landing-pages-components__LOADABLE_LOADED_CHUNKS__"]||[];c.forEach(a.bind(null,0)),c.push=a.bind(null,c.push.bind(c))})();var //# sourceMappingURL=https://istatic.booking.com/internal-static/capla/static/js/remoteEntry.4031bf54.client.js.map
